title: Ben's Oneblocks
description: My take on the popular Oneblock franchise! Every wanted to create your own one blocks? Well now you can!
body:
Ever wanted to play OneBlock but with multiple one blocks? Well, now you can!

This mod adds the One Block as an item, which you can place alongside the main one block! They also allow you to gain blocks which you wouldn't get from the normal one block! It can't be too easy though, so we made them function slower! You can either craft or unlock them!

There is now a block counter at the top of your screen, which shows how many you have mined! Check the advancement menu to see how close you are to the next phase.

This mod is joined on to the Spawn Egg Infuser mod, allowing you to craft spawn eggs out of the remains of mods via the Infuser Table! Check out its mod page for more info.

This mod is compatible with JEI.

Yes, I am aware that the block drops when you mine it with anything. No, this is not intentional. No, I am not going to fix it.

Yes, I am aware that sometime items don't join together. It will fixed someday (hopefully) but it isn't at the top of our to do list. Yet.


This is my take on the One Block mod, I claim no ownership over the original.


Have fun!
